query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.status,
  e.createdAt,
  e.customerName,
  e.customerEmail,
  e.customerPhone,
  e.stripeSubscriptionId,
  e.downPaymentAmount,
  mp.name as packageName,
  mp.monthlyPrice
FROM enrollments e
LEFT JOIN membershipPackages mp ON e.membershipPackageId = mp.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
